specializations: Hair care actives and scalp-conditioning ingredients
Plant stem cell technology for hair and scalp
Sensory and fragrance-enhanced hair care systems
product_highlights: SymHair™ series — clinically validated hair care actives targeting hair growth, scalp health, and fibre strength
SymSitive® — scalp-calming active for sensitive and reactive scalp conditions
Bioferment-derived actives for hair follicle stimulation and scalp microbiome support
Plant stem cell extracts for scalp rejuvenation and follicle protection from ageing
notes: Symrise is one of the top five global fragrance and cosmetic ingredient companies, headquartered in Holzminden, Germany. Through its Diana and Cosmo International Fragrances divisions, Symrise offers a growing portfolio of hair care actives including the SymHair™ range of scalp and hair fibre actives, and SymSitive® for sensitive scalp applications. Their hair care science combines biotechnology, plant stem cell extraction, and scalp microbiome research to deliver multi-functional actives backed by clinical and consumer study data.
